name: OpenClaw Orchestrator
description: Bridge tools that expose OpenClaw Orchestrator capabilities inside OpenClaw.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the external openclaw-orchestrator service, for example http://127.0.0.1:3721.

authToken.description: Optional bearer token used when calling the external orchestrator service.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout in milliseconds when the plugin later calls the orchestrator service.
